step_rationale: Mast cell serine protease; degrades endothelial matrix and promotes vasodilation; mechanistically implicated in erosion.
mechanism: Tryptase is a mast cell-derived serine protease that degrades endothelial extracellular matrix and contributes to endothelial erosion in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Desquamation of human coronary artery endothelium by human mast cell proteases: implications for plaque erosion.
Serum tryptase levels in acute coronary syndromes.

trials.title: Evaluation of Tryptase as a Biomarker of Coronary Heart Disease
